description: Compiler2 currently has no equivalent of the old-world external interface table path. Imports that should resolve through external interfaces (for example fixtures2/00069_import_from_external_interface.fz) park forever on placeholder ModuleIndexed/ModuleDefined waits instead of resolving, and missing imported modules also never collapse into a proper unknown-module diagnostic through that path. This blocks the remaining compiler2 port_resolve import/interface tests and likely the runtime-interface-dependent cases in the same arc.
title: Compiler2: add external interface import/interface resolution
